ideal_must_detect.matched_text: For illustration of processing scope, Ms. Adeline Kwa (born 1990-05-14, age 36), Associate Compliance Officer at Lion Meridian Capital Ltd., used company laptop LMC-SG-LT-9833 and messenger handle akwa_audit06 to access the deal room from Harbourview Annex, 12 Coral Quay, Singapore 000123 at 12:10 SGT (session ref EQOPS-2026-06-01-T12)
may also be associated with MNPI
We do not solicit NRIC numbers or exact birthdays in investor roadshow registrations unless strictly necessary by law or regulation

In the event of a notifiable breach likely to result in significant harm, we will notify the PDPC as required and, where relevant, inform SGX if there is a risk of MNPI leakage affecting continuous disclosure.

Personal Data under the PDPA includes direct identifiers and quasi-identifiers that can identify an individual when combined with other information reasonably accessible to us.
For illustration of processing scope, Ms. Adeline Kwa (born 1990-05-14, age 36), Associate Compliance Officer at Lion Meridian Capital Ltd., used company laptop LMC-SG-LT-9833 and messenger handle akwa_audit06 to access the deal room from Harbourview Annex, 12 Coral Quay, Singapore 000123 at 12:10 SGT (session ref EQOPS-2026-06-01-T12).
The foregoing data points may constitute personal data and, when linked to pre-announcement term sheets, may also be associated with MNPI as defined under the SFA and SGX Listing Manual (e.g., Rule 703 material information)
ideal_must_detect.reason: moved from must_detect after strict runtime no longer emitted exact span during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text: In the event of a notifiable breach likely to result in significant harm, we will notify the PDPC as required and, where relevant, inform SGX if there is a risk of MNPI leakage affecting continuous disclosure.

For illustration of processing scope, Ms. Adeline Kwa (born 1990-05-14, age 36), Associate Compliance Officer at Lion Meridian Capital Ltd., used company laptop LMC-SG-LT-9833 and messenger handle akwa_audit06 to access the deal room from Harbourview Annex, 12 Coral Quay, Singapore 000123 at 12:10 SGT (session ref EQOPS-2026-06-01-T12).
The foregoing data points may constitute personal data and, when linked to pre-announcement term sheets, may also be associated with MNPI as defined under the SFA and SGX Listing Manual (e.g., Rule 703 material information).
Access to MNPI is limited to a clean team and named reviewers (e.g., Mr. Rohan Pillay, Deal Room Manager, Straits Harbour Law LLC), with insider lists maintained for SGX compliance and wall-crossing acknowledgments recorded.
We implement role-based controls, two-factor authentication for the virtual data room, hashed session IDs (e.g., vrm_sess_7f12ac9), and segregated folders for HR versus capital-markets materials.
Cross-border transfers, if any, will be to approved subprocessors such as Cloud Raptor Services Pte. Ltd. (SG hosting) and Nordic Banyan Data AS (NO analytics), under contracts ensuring a PDPA-comparable standard of protection and documented transfer risk assessments.
Retention for transaction files and trading surveillance logs is up to 5 years to meet SFA/SGX obligations on records and disclosure controls, unless a legal hold requires longer.
Individuals may submit data access or correction requests to dpo@lionmeridiancap.sg or privacy@straitsharbourlaw.sg; we target a response within 30 days and may charge a reasonable fee for complex retrieval.
For workforce analytics and capacity planning, we may use aggregated descriptors (e.g., analysts aged 30–34 in the east region or Android device users) that are not used to single out any person.
Similar but non-identifying signals (e.g., device model “AsterTab 9”, Wi‑Fi SSID “Guest-Board-3F”, or private IP 10.64.21.45) appearing alone in logs are treated as operational data unless linked to an identified individual.
We do not solicit NRIC numbers or exact birthdays in investor roadshow registrations unless strictly necessary by law or regulation, and such forms are segregated from deal documentation.
In the event of a notifiable breach likely to result in significant harm, we will notify the PDPC as required and, where relevant, inform SGX if there is a risk of MNPI leakage affecting continuous disclosure.

must_not_detect.reason: Role noun in parentheses; not PII/MNPI

uncertain.reason: Usernames/handles can identify individuals in context but no explicit allowed rule for generic handles
Physical address line is PII but only the 6-digit SG postal code has a specific allowed rule
Access times can be personal data in context but there is no explicit timestamp rule
Network SSIDs may be linkable but are not covered by an allowed rule
Device model can be a quasi-identifier but not enumerated in allowed rules
Legally relevant privacy incident reference but not clearly mapped to an allowed MNPI/privacy-event rule
Security control indicating pseudonymised identifiers; not explicitly covered by allowed rules
